{{Quote|Seize the day, and you have the day. But wait for the right day to seize, and you will seize entire lifetimes.|Kla|<ref name="JvSTEGttF">[[Jedi vs. Sith: The Essential Guide to the Force (real-life book)|''Jedi vs. Sith: The Essential Guide to the Force'']]</ref>}}
'''Kla''' was a [[Humanoid/Legends|humanoid]] [[Gender/Legends|male]] [[Sith Lord/Legends|Sith Lord]] from the time after the [[Great Hyperspace War/Legends|Great Hyperspace War]].

==Biography==
Kla was once a [[Jedi/Legends|Jedi]], more specifically, a [[Jedi Consular]].<ref name="JvSTEGttF" /> As a Sith, he became a practitioner of [[Sith alchemy/Legends|Sith alchemy]] and the [[Gatekeeper/Legends|gatekeeper]] of at least two [[Sith holocron/Legends|Sith holocrons]].

One of them was [[Bo Vanda]]'s [[Bo Vanda's holocron|holocron]], which also housed the spirit of [[Komok-Da]]. He attempted to trick users of Vanda's [[Holocron/Legends|holocron]], telling them that they needed to take it to [[Korriban/Legends|Korriban]] to use it; in reality, he wished to go to the planet to gain enough strength to leave the Holocron and possess the user's body.

The other was the [[Telos Holocron]] in which Kla recorded a tale of the old [[Sith Empire/Legends|Sith Empire's]] fall. He had comprehensive knowledge of the Empire under [[Naga Sadow/Legends|Naga Sadow]], some of which may have been obtained from a Sith holocron held by [[Jedi Master/Legends|Jedi Master]] [[Odan-Urr/Legends|Odan-Urr]] on [[Ossus/Legends|Ossus]].<ref name="JvSTEGttF" />

Kla believed that the Sith could benefit from employing the patience that the Jedi Order exercised, as he had gained much from it himself. Consequently, he thought Naga Sadow's eagerness was the cause of the Sith Empire's fall.<ref name="JvSTEGttF" />

{{Char-stub}}
